task_updates.executor_notes: Final verification did not pass cleanly, so I stopped at verification instead of claiming completion. The new dialog early-return guard check passed (`node scripts/quality/check-dialog-early-return-rule.mjs`), and `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Repo-wide lint failed with 247 errors across unrelated areas, including `src/domains/generation/hooks/useDeleteGenerationWithConfirm.ts:22`, `src/features/projects/services/projectSetupRepository.ts:1`, and `src/tools/video-editor/compositions/VisualClip.tsx:233`. The full reigh-app vitest suite also failed: 19 files / 36 tests failing, with representative failures in `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/TimelineContainer/components/TimelineTrackPrelude.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/SettingsModal/sections/GenerationSection/components/GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`, `src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`, and `src/shared/lib/__tests__/taskCreation.test.ts`. I also wrote a throwaway repro test that exercised the original flow (enter edit mode, open LoRA selector, close it, type in the textarea, open the model Select), confirmed it passes, and deleted the temporary file immediately after verification.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verification was run end-to-end. The dialog rule check passed, type-check passed, and the throwaway repro passed then was deleted. The final gate is still red because repo-wide lint is not clean (247 errors) and the full vitest suite is not green (19 failed files / 36 failed tests).
